content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: webhook_skew_fix
C: abs(now-ts)>"300" ∧ returns("401") ∧ valid_webhook_rejected
P: widen_tolerance ∧ allow_provider_skew ∧ keep_401_on_real_expiry
V: edge(-299s_200) ∧ edge(301s_401) ∧ no_regression
A: adjust_skew_check ∧ add_regression_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace24h_boundary_fix
C: overdue_402 ∧ "24h" ∧ "402" ∧ charge_loop
P: compute_grace_window ∧ skip_charge_in_grace ∧ enforce_402_after_24h
V: edge(23h59m_no_charge) ∧ edge(24h00m_402) ∧ no_loop
A: add_grace_check ∧ add_regression_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: grace24h_boundary_fix.
Constraints: overdue_402 and "24h" and "402" and charge_loop.
Plan: compute_grace_window and skip_charge_in_grace and enforce_402_after_24h.
Verify: edge(23h59m_no_charge) and edge(24h00m_402) and no_loop.
Answer target: add_grace_check and add_regression_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: capsule_micro_arch
C: team("9") ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ compliance_ready
P: modular_monolith ∧ extract_auth_service ∧ shared_pg_schemas_isolated ∧ platform_plus_sec_ops
V: steady_traffic_fit ∧ audit_boundaries ∧ 12w_feasible ∧ team9_cognitive_load
A: default_arch(modular_monolith+auth_svc) ∧ short_why("9 devs 12w favor monolith compliance needs auth split")

[AUDIT]
Goal: capsule_micro_arch.
Constraints: team("9") and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and compliance_ready.
Plan: modular_monolith and extract_auth_service and shared_pg_schemas_isolated and platform_plus_sec_ops.
Verify: steady_traffic_fit and audit_boundaries and 12w_feasible and team9_cognitive_load.
Answer target: default_arch(modular_monolith+auth_svc) and short_why("9 devs 12w favor monolith compliance needs auth split").

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: capsule_micro_arch
C: team="6" ∧ ddl="9 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pt_mlops ∧ postgres_queue
V: fits_6_devs ∧ ships_in_9_weeks ∧ async_decoupled
A: modular_monolith_api ∧ sidecar_worker ∧ pg_listen_notify

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_fix
C: ".." ∧ "download" ∧ baseDir+'/'+req.query.file ∧ no_validation
P: sanitize_filename ∧ resolve_and_check_prefix ∧ reject_traversal
V: edge("../etc/passwd"_403) ∧ edge(valid_file_200) ∧ symlink_escape_blocked
A: use_path.basename ∧ verify_resolved_within_baseDir ∧ add_regression_tests

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_sort_sqli
C: "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ string_concat ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: allowlist_columns ∧ map_to_identifier ∧ validate_direction
V: sqli_fuzz ∧ unit_tests_malicious_sort ∧ static_taint_check
A: replace_concat_with_allowlist ∧ parameterize_identifier ∧ add_regression_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_sort_sqli.
Constraints: "sort" and "SELECT" and string_concat and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: allowlist_columns and map_to_identifier and validate_direction.
Verify: sqli_fuzz and unit_tests_malicious_sort and static_taint_check.
Answer target: replace_concat_with_allowlist and parameterize_identifier and add_regression_tests.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ "await" ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ "await" ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_calls_next(err) ∧ no_behavior_change
A: convert_to_async_await ∧ wrap_db_calls_try_catch ∧ forward_next(err)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and "await" and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and "await" and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_calls_next(err) and no_behavior_change.
Answer target: convert_to_async_await and wrap_db_calls_try_catch and forward_next(err).

@sigil v0 hybrid

P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_forwards_next(err) ∧ no_behavior_change
A: mark_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_next(err)

Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log and next.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_forwards_next(err) and no_behavior_change.
